name: Kerapac's wrist wraps
hoverSummary: Tier 85 magic gloves with 13.2 magic damage bonus and a Dragon Breath to Combust passive.
detailLines: For 6 seconds after Dragon Breath, Combust deals 25% more damage and resolves instantly.
The PvP-disabled instant-combust behavior is planned for the dedicated magic mechanics pass.
implementationNotes: Curated magic gloves from the live Kerapac's wrist wraps page. Wiki-verified with Playwright for tier, style bonus, and Dragon Breath/Combust passive text.
